provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Consular Conventions Act.

provisions.title: Powers of consular officers in relation to property in Botswana of deceased persons
provisions.content:
2. Powers of consular officers in relation to property in Botswana of deceased persons
(1) Where any person who is a national of a state to which this Act applies is named as executor in the will of a deceased person disposing of property in Botswana, or is otherwise a person to whom a grant of representation to the estate in Botswana of a deceased person may be made, then if the Master of the High Court is satisfied, on the application of a consular officer of the said state, that the said national is not resident in Botswana, and if no application for a grant of such representation is made by a person duly authorised by power of attorney to act for him in that behalf, the Master of the High Court shall make to that officer any such grant of representation to the estate of the deceased as would be made to him if he were so authorised as aforesaid:
